title: Science Fiction in the Real World
author: Norman Spinrad
card_summary: IJERN IVES is a series under the general editorship of Eric S. Olander that has been established to serve the growing critical audience of science fiction, fantastic fiction, and speculative fiction.
page_summary: IJERN IVES is a series under the general editorship of Eric S. Olander that has been established to serve the growing critical audience of science fiction, fantastic fiction, and speculative fiction. Other titles in this series are: The Science Fiction of Mark Clifton, edited by Barry N. Greenberg Fantastic Lives: Autobiographical Essays by Notable Science Fiction Writers, edited by Martin H. Greenberg Astounding Science Fiction: July 1939, edited by Martin H.
